prompt: tests are green. `SavingsAccount` and `CheckingAccount` both extend `Account` and each has an identical `validateWithdrawal(amount)` method -- same body, copy-pasted into both siblings. whats the next refactoring to remove that duplication?
assertions: Names Pull Up Method as the best-fit next refactoring
Names an in-set Duplicated Code refactoring (Extract Function, Slide Statements, or Pull Up Method)
Routes to the Fowler mechanical layer
Ties the pick to WHERE the duplication lives (identical code in sibling subclasses -> lift to the shared parent), not a generic dedup
Does not edit any source file and does not run tests (coach, don't drive)
